help.name: help
help.description: Show an overview of available commands.

config.name: config
config.description: Configure basic settings for the bot.

birthday-role.name: birthday-role
birthday-role.description: Set the role given to users having a birthday.

set-timezone.name: set-timezone
set-timezone.description: Configure the time zone to use by default in the server. Leave blank to unset.

zone.name: zone
zone.description: A 'tzdata'-compliant time zone name. See help for more details.

private-confirms.name: private-confirms
private-confirms.description: Sets whether to make confirmation messages visible only to the user.

setting.name: setting
setting.description: True to enable, False to disable.

add-only.name: add-only
add-only.description: Sets if users are restricted from editing their birthday after adding it.

setting.name: setting
setting.description: True to enable, False to disable.

set-channel.name: set-channel
set-channel.description: Set which channel will receive announcement messages. Leave blank to unset.

set-ping.name: set-ping
set-ping.description: Set whether to ping users mentioned in the announcement.

option.name: option
option.description: Set True to ping users, False to display them normally.

test.name: test
test.description: Immediately attempt to send an announcement message as configured.

placeholder.name: placeholder
placeholder.description: A user to add into the testing announcement as a placeholder.

placeholder2.name: placeholder2
placeholder2.description: A user to add into the testing announcement as a placeholder.

placeholder3.name: placeholder3
placeholder3.description: A user to add into the testing announcement as a placeholder.

placeholder4.name: placeholder4
placeholder4.description: A user to add into the testing announcement as a placeholder.

placeholder5.name: placeholder5
placeholder5.description: A user to add into the testing announcement as a placeholder.

timers-reset.name: timers-reset
timers-reset.description: Resets the bot's internal timers to possibly repeat today's announcements.

remove.name: remove
remove.description: Removes your birthday information from this bot.

user.name: user
user.description: Optional: The user's birthday to look up.

show-nearest.name: show-nearest
show-nearest.description: Get a list of users who recently had or will have a birthday.

date.name: date
date.description: A date, including the month and day. For example, "15 January".

zone.name: zone
zone.description: A 'tzdata'-compliant time zone name. See help for more details.

timezone.name: timezone
timezone.description: Sets or updates your time zone if your birthday is already set.

zone.name: zone
zone.description: A 'tzdata'-compliant time zone name. See help for more details.

override.name: override
override.description: Commands to set options for other users.

set-birthday.name: set-birthday
set-birthday.description: Set a user's birthday on their behalf.

target.name: target
target.description: The user whose data to modify.

date.name: date
date.description: A date, including the month and day. For example, "15 January".

set-timezone.name: set-timezone
set-timezone.description: Set a user's time zone on their behalf.

target.name: target
target.description: The user whose data to modify.

zone.name: zone
zone.description: A 'tzdata'-compliant time zone name. See help for more details.

remove-birthday.name: remove-birthday
remove-birthday.description: Remove a user's birthday information on their behalf.

target.name: target
target.description: The user whose data to modify.

export-birthdays.name: export-birthdays
export-birthdays.description: Generates a text file with all known and available birthdays.

format.name: format
format.description: Specify the format of the exported data.
